# Final Review Proposal

## Summary

I reviewed the diff (`.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-3/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-3/run.json` only). No application or implementation files were modified, so there are no concrete correctness, safety, or robustness defects to propose in code. The changes are run-state metadata updates from the review workflow.

## Amendments

None.
